title: Adobe CJM ExperienceEvent - Channel Context
description: Channel context for inbound and tracking events across SMS, WhatsApp, RCS, and custom channels. Captures channel-specific fields including inbound message details, interaction, and flow submission data.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Experience channel
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Experience channel related to the ExperienceEvent.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: SMS Provider
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: SMS provider, e.g. sinch or twilio

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: SMS Message Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: SMS message type, e.g. inbound, inboundReply or send

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: SMS Inbound Message
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: SMS inbound reply, e.g. stop, start, subscribe, etc.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: SMS Inbound Number
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: SMS inbound number: sender ID where the MO message was received

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Channel Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Channel sub-type, e.g. SMS, MMS, RCS

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Profile Phone Number
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Phone number of the profile that sent the inbound message

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Original Timestamp
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Timestamp of the event as reported by the SMS provider

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Status
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Status section containing provider feedback details.

xdm:feedbackStatus.title: Feedback Status
xdm:feedbackStatus.description: Actual feedback status mapped to a standard enum.

xdm:providerFeedbackStatus.title: Provider Feedback Status
xdm:providerFeedbackStatus.description: Status as reported by the SMS provider before mapping, e.g. DeliveredToTerminal.

xdm:message.title: Message
xdm:message.description: Message from the SMS provider, either success or failure.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: SMS Metadata
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: A dynamic map of additional metadata key/value pairs associated with the SMS channel context

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: WhatsApp Message Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: WhatsApp message type, e.g. templateBased, response, reaction, nfm_reply

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: WhatsApp Inbound Message
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Text body of the inbound WhatsApp message

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: WhatsApp Inbound Number
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: WABA phone number on which the inbound message was received

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Channel Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: WhatsApp channel category, e.g. Utility, Marketing, Promotional

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Profile Phone Number
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Phone number of the end-user profile that sent the inbound message

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Original Timestamp
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Timestamp of the event as reported by Meta

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Status
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Status section containing provider feedback details.

xdm:feedbackStatus.title: Feedback Status
xdm:feedbackStatus.description: Actual feedback status mapped to a standard enum. Not the raw provider status.

xdm:providerFeedbackStatus.title: Provider Feedback Status
xdm:providerFeedbackStatus.description: Status as reported by the WhatsApp provider before mapping, e.g. DeliveredToTerminal.

xdm:message.title: Message
xdm:message.description: Message from the WhatsApp provider, either success or failure.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: WhatsApp Metadata
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: A dynamic map of additional metadata key/value pairs associated with the WhatsApp channel context

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Response Content
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Content of the user response - emoji for reactions, or message text for replies to a specific message

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Original Message ID
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: ID of the original message being responded to (for reactions or replies)

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Response Action Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Type of response action from WhatsApp - react, unreact, or reply

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Interactive Selected Title
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Title of the option selected by the user in a WhatsApp list or button reply

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Interactive Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Type of WhatsApp interactive message response, e.g. list_reply, button_reply, nfm_reply

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Interactive Selected Description
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Description of the selected option in a WhatsApp interactive message

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Interactive Selected ID
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: ID of the option selected by the user in a WhatsApp list or button reply

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Flow Response
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: JSON string containing the form field values submitted by the user through a WhatsApp Flow

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Tags
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Tags associated with the inbound messaging interaction, e.g. inbound message text, keyword category, and source

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Label
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Label identifying the category of the inbound interaction, e.g. the matched keyword type
